description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front surface, featuring a centered punch-hole front camera at the top. The back is a matte blue finish with a triple camera array and a flash module arranged vertically in the upper left corner, slightly raised from the surface. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with visible buttons on the right edge. The device is sleek, with rounded corners and a flat profile, typical of contemporary mobile phones. The branding is subtly embossed on the lower back, blending with the matte finish. The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple hues, and no visible icons or notifications.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, matte blue back, and a triple rear camera array. The device features a punch-hole front camera and subtle branding on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a centered punch-hole camera and colorful abstract wallpaper.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the slim profile and visible side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte blue finish, triple camera array, flash, and subtle branding.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the slim edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed Samsung text centered on the lower back, subtle and matching the matte blue finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a single flash module. A small punch-hole front camera is centered at the top of the display.
attribute_button_layout: Two physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely a volume rocker and a power button, both slim and elongated.
